title: Linked Field in Title Column
excerpt: I currently have the second column configured as a linked field, an that works great, but I have to manually put something in the title column. I would rather not have that title column as a manual text entry box as curr…

posts.author: sabont (Scott Bontrager)
posts.cookedHtml:
I currently have the second column configured as a linked field, an that works great, but I have to manually put something in the title column. I would rather not have that title column as a manual text entry box as currently configured.

Any Tips?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sabont,

Thanks for posting this! At the moment the title column information does have to be entered manually and cannot be made into a link column (or any other column type), I’m afraid.

If you’re looking for assistance with your workflow, feel free to write into support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help.
